title: ornduffia submersa
intro: Ornduffia submersa, also known as the floating rat's tail, is a rare and unusual aquatic plant that grows in the wild, typically found in Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health issues. The health benefits of Ornduffia submersa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, among others. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
